name: party-supply-gateway-handler
description: Gateway Lambda target. Production runtime is nodejs24.x (configured in scripts/deploy.sh); engines.node is set to >=22 so local builds with Node 22 still work.
_awsSdkPinning: Keep all @aws-sdk/client-* on a single exact version so npm can't resolve individual clients to newer patches whose @smithy/core requirements don't match the hoisted copy. Skew causes 'makeBuilder is not a function' at Lambda cold start. Bump every client-* in lockstep when updating.
